name: A play ground
description:
You stand in a large sandbox.  All around the sandbox is park and trees.  Yet
here your shoes fill with sand and other interesting things that are buried
under the sand.  There are many different types of toys here, from a HUGE
playground house to swings, and slides.  All around you, bratty children scream
as they chase each other around in multiple games of tag and hide and seek.  
As you look at the scene you think back to the fun times you had as a kid, when
evil orcs were not trying to kill you and towns did not need walls to keep out
evil creatures.
